lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. There is significant damage to the exterior and the interior is heavily worn. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy.
The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and tear on the upholstery. The engine is operational but requires regular maintenance to address its age.

This vehicle is in exceptional, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car. Every aspect of the exterior is flawless, with the original factory paint maintaining a deep, brilliant shine and absolutely no stone chips, scratches, or dings. The interior is equally perfect, showing no signs of wear on the upholstery, carpets, or dashboard. All mechanical systems have been maintained to the highest standard, and the vehicle drives perfectly. This is a rare, showroom-quality example for a discerning buyer who wants the very best.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable and character-filled ride! This vehicle has been a reliable companion and is in solid fair condition, showing some typical signs of wear and tear that come with its history. It’s a fantastic opportunity to own a quality model at a much more accessible price point. It runs well and is ready to take you on your next adventure!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It has significant mechanical and cosmetic issues that will require substantial investment to rectify. The exterior shows extensive rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, along with heavily oxidized paint and several large dents. Inside, the upholstery is badly torn, and several interior controls are non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and there is a noticeable slip in the transmission. This car is best suited as a parts donor or a major restoration project for someone with mechanical expertise.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This unit has been curated to meet our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. It offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value, suitable for those who demand excellence without compromise. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our expectations for high-quality pre-owned inventory.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready to hit the road? I’m selling my car and it’s in really solid shape! It’s been well-loved and taken care of, making it a perfect daily driver for someone who wants quality without the 'brand new' price tag. It runs smoothly and has plenty of life left in it. I'd love for it to go to a great new home, so come take a look and see for yourself!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable runner. Recent service complete. Clean title. No issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor, age-appropriate stone chips on the front fascia that do not detract from its overall presence. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary; the premium upholstery is in excellent shape, showing only light natural creasing on the driver's seat bolster. Every button, switch, and digital display functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection recently. The engine pulls strongly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. It comes with a complete service history, two sets of keys, and tires with plenty of remaining life. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of sophisticated performance and lasting value. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, the automobile offers a refined driving experience indicative of responsible ownership. We invite you to secure this dependable asset, which stands as a testament to engineering excellence and remains prepared for immediate service.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L straight-six, delivering linear power through its individual throttle bodies to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with a factory-spec limited-slip differential and recently inspected subframe mounts. While showing honest signs of use consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals are robust, including a serviced VANOS system and high-pressure VANOS line upgrade. It rides on staggered Style 67 wheels wrapped in high-performance rubber, offering exceptional lateral grip and communicative steering feedback.
